TextView.android:text: Please read these terms carefully before using ExpenseVault and its financial management features.
By accessing or using ExpenseVault, you agree to follow these Terms & Conditions.
By creating an account or using ExpenseVault, you agree to comply with these Terms & Conditions and applicable policies.
You are responsible for maintaining accurate account information and protecting your password, verification codes and other account credentials.
ExpenseVault provides financial organization and analysis features. Information displayed by the app should not be considered professional financial advice.

ExpenseVault may use artificial intelligence and machine learning to categorize expenses, analyze spending patterns and generate financial insights. AI-generated results may not always be completely accurate.
Subscription detection, renewal predictions and usage analysis are provided for informational purposes. You remain responsible for managing and cancelling subscriptions with service providers.
Users are responsible for managing family groups, invitations, permissions and information shared through the Family Dashboard.
You agree not to misuse ExpenseVault, attempt unauthorized access, interfere with app functionality or use the service for unlawful activities.
The ExpenseVault name, interface, design, software and related content are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
We aim to provide reliable access to ExpenseVault, but uninterrupted or error-free availability cannot always be guaranteed.
ExpenseVault is not responsible for financial decisions, losses or damages resulting from reliance on automated insights, predictions or information provided through the app.
These Terms & Conditions may be updated when ExpenseVault features, services or legal requirements change.
If you have questions or concerns regarding these Terms & Conditions, you can contact the ExpenseVault support team.
ExpenseVault is a financial management tool and does not provide professional financial, investment, tax or legal advice.
Have questions about these Terms & Conditions? Our support team is ready to help.
